recommendations.title: Love Lies Bleeding
recommendations.overview: Reclusive gym manager Lou falls hard for Jackie, an ambitious bodybuilder headed through town to Las Vegas in pursuit of her dream. But their love ignites violence, pulling them deep into the web of Lou’s criminal family.

recommendations.title: The Man from Nowhere
recommendations.overview: A reclusive pawnshop owner goes on a brutal rampage to rescue a young girl kidnapped by a criminal organization.

recommendations.title: Heatwave
recommendations.overview: A woman's life takes an unexpected turn when she falls for her boss's wife. She must soon defend herself as she becomes entangled in a web of malice.

recommendations.title: Kate
recommendations.overview: A ruthless criminal operative has less than 24 hours to exact revenge on her enemies and in the process forms an unexpected bond with the daughter of one of her past victims.

recommendations.title: The Operative
recommendations.overview: A young Western woman is recruited by the Mossad to go undercover in Tehran where she becomes entangled in a complex triangle with her handler and her subject.

recommendations.title: Equity
recommendations.overview: Senior investment banker Naomi Bishop’s world of high-power big money is brutal and fierce, and one she thrives in. When a controversial IPO threatens the fragile balance of power and confidentiality, Naomi finds herself entangled in a web of politic

recommendations.title: Get the Gringo
recommendations.overview: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison where he learns to survive with the help of a 9-year-old boy.

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: A woman seeks to take revenge when her younger sister disappears and she finds out that her sister suffered violence and sexual abuse from school bullies.

recommendations.title: Guns Akimbo
recommendations.overview: An ordinary guy suddenly finds himself forced to fight a gladiator-like battle for a dark website that streams the violence for viewers. In order to survive and rescue his kidnapped ex-girlfriend, he must battle Nix, a heavily armed and much more exp

recommendations.title: Hangmen Also Die!
